title: Ralph Lauren: Why There Could Be Renewed Upside
text: Ralph Lauren has seen strong growth in sales - across both digital and brick and mortar channels. The company has shown a strengthening cash position.

title: Here's Why You Should Hold Ralph Lauren (RL) Stock Right Now
text: Although inflation and elevated expenses remain worrisome, the solid online show, strong AUR growth and gains from the Next Great Chapter plan are likely to aid Ralph Lauren (RL).
